## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? Link any related issues (e.g. Closes #123). -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore (no functional change)

## How Tested

<!-- Describe how you verified the change. -->

- [ ] Go tests (`go test ./...`)
- [ ] Frontend typecheck / unit / e2e (`cd web && bunx tsc --noEmit`, `bun run test`, `bun run test:e2e`)
- [ ] Manual testing (describe below)

<!-- Manual testing notes: -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (backend and/or frontend, as relevant)
- [ ] Documentation updated where needed (README, CLAUDE.md, comments)
- [ ] Changes are surgical — no unrelated refactors or reformatting
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits (e.g. `feat(scope): ...`, `fix(scope): ...`)
- [ ] CI is green
